message:
✨ Add cloud provider detection and console links

- Detect cloud provider from cluster name (EKS, GKE, AKS, OpenShift, etc.)
- Show provider icon and badge in cluster list and detail modal
- Add external link to cloud provider console (AWS, GCP, Azure)
- Support for local clusters (Kind, Minikube, K3s)
- Links open in new tab without closing modal

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
